input.command: kubectl get ns | grep spark; echo ---; kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1; echo ---PODS---; kubectl get pods -n spark-pi 2>&1; echo ---ROLE---; kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1

spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 313e19c7-0558-4ae1-a908-f7fcdf1b75c5
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi

        controller-uid: 313e19c7-0558-4ae1-a908-f7fcdf1b75c5
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \

        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent

      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-nonexistent
      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30

content.text: Good — `spark-pi` ServiceAccount and RoleBinding already exist correctly. Now let's delete the failed job, patch the RBAC role, and reapply a fixed job manifest.

input.command:
kubectl delete job spark-pi -n spark-pi
kubectl patch role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/rules/0/resources/-", "value": "pods"}]'
kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml

content.content:

role.rbac.authorization.k8s.io/spark-pi-role patched

content.text: RBAC fixed. Now let's check if the job manifest file exists locally (given prior stages, it likely doesn't), and construct the fixed manifest based on the last-applied-configuration we already captured.

content.content:
Exit code 2

content.text: As expected, consistent with earlier stages — I'll author the fixed manifest locally, matching the original spec but with the three fixes applied.

input.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            echo "=============================================="
            echo "  SparkPi Job"
            echo "=============================================="
            export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
            /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
              --master local[2] \
              --driver-memory 512m \
              --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
              /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
              1000
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never
